data.content: Approved for implementation. The plan correctly targets the missing initial take-loop non-zero-exit branch in terminal-manager, keeps success classification based on observed workflow states instead of unavailable buildTakePrompt claim metadata, stores detailed per-iteration agent outcome data in a repo-local .foolery-logs path, and adds coverage for rollback, alternate-agent retry, no-alternative termination, and later-iteration parity. No invariant conflicts found.
